description_long: This rifle features a sleek, angular design with a predominantly matte black finish and a single blue circular accent near the rear of the receiver. The body is constructed with sharp, geometric lines and a flat top, giving it a modern, tactical appearance. The stock is integrated into the main body, forming a continuous structure with no visible separation, and the grip area is subtly contoured for ergonomic handling. The barrel is short and squared off, lacking any visible muzzle device or flash suppressor. There are no visible iron sights, optics, or accessory rails, suggesting a minimalist approach to attachments. The overall form is compact and streamlined, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is essential.
description: A modern, angular black rifle with a blue accent, integrated stock, and a compact, streamlined form. The design is minimalist, lacking visible sights or muzzle devices.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from a rear-side angle, highlighting the blue accent and the integrated, angular stock.
description_view_1: Viewed from the opposite rear-side, the flat top and squared-off barrel are more prominent, with the blue accent still visible.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the continuous body and stock, as well as the short, blocky barrel.
description_view_3: From this angle, the grip area and the geometric, contoured design of the rifle are most apparent.
